Name: FSpinBoxStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SSpinBox

Variables.Name: BackgroundBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the background of the spinbox

Variables.Name: HoveredBackgroundBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the background of the spinbox when it's hovered over

Variables.Name: ActiveFillBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to fill the spinbox when it's active

Variables.Name: InactiveFillBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to fill the spinbox when it's inactive

Variables.Name: ArrowsImage
Variables.Description: Image used to draw the spinbox arrows

Variables.Name: ForegroundColor
Variables.Description: Color used to draw the spinbox foreground elements

Variables.Name: TextPadding
Variables.Description: Padding to add around the spinbox and its text
